title: Men's 2024 Olympic Triathlon Postponed Due to Poor Quality of Water in Seine
description: The men's triathlon competition at the 2024 Paris Olympics has been postponed due to poor water quality in the Seine, World Triathlon said in a statement on Tuesday.
keywords: france, dirty seine, olympic pollution seine, seine pollution, seine poor quality of water, faile olympic
